ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If turned on, the preview popover will follow the mouse pointer.
ast.target: 如果开启，预览弹出框将跟随鼠标指针。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If turned on, pressing arrow keys or hovering the mouse pointer over a suggestion while holding the modifier key will not immediately close the preview, but instead wait for the preview for the newly selected suggestion to load.
ast.target: 如果开启，当按住修饰键时，按方向键或将鼠标指针悬停在建议上不会立即关闭预览，而是等待新选中建议的预览加载完成。
